name: SmashMetal: Car Wrek Wars
description: Get ready for the most intense car wreck action! Smash Metal Car Wrek Wars Ultimate Car Crash Battle! is a high-speed addicted car battle game where destruction means highest point achieve. Drift, crash, and wreck your way to dominance in this epic car destruction simulator with fun way. Realistic crash physics Epic metal-on-metal battles Multiple arenas with increasing chaos Can you survive the war of wrecks? Try now and prove your driving rage! Game Features: Full of fun Earn Coin and Loss Coin! Stunning wrecked car models Game like catch me if you can! 2 minutes wrecking arena gameplay Addictive funny car smashing battle
instructions: Keyboard Left amp Right Key Mobile Left amp Right Screen Touch
